after.head: 9dc8c8374454cc81d18e2389e0412d6fdc473e31 + Pass70 patch

lever: Exact borrowed row-major I64 max scan path for shared scalar init, batch axis 0, rank-2 xs. It bypasses move_batch_dim_to_front cloning and the per-element Literal operation matcher.

isomorphism_proof.acceptance: Only accepts unbatched I64 scalar or scalar-tensor init, I64 rank-2 xs with batch_dim 0, explicit body_op=max, and valid row-major element count. All other cases fall back to the previous scalar scan path.
isomorphism_proof.ordering: Rows are emitted in ascending batch index. Within each row, scan_idx order matches the prior forward/reverse loops.
isomorphism_proof.arithmetic: Uses i64::max, matching the prior apply_scan_scalar_op Max branch and signed integer max semantics.
isomorphism_proof.tie_breaking: Equal I64 values produce the same observable Literal::I64 value; no ordering, scheduling, sorting, branch-selection, or identity-bearing tie surface changes.
isomorphism_proof.floating_point: No F32/F64 path is accepted by the new helper; existing FP max behavior falls back unchanged.
isomorphism_proof.rng: No RNG state or sampling behavior is touched.
